Symbiosis Institute of Design Entrance T.official_note: Official SID (sid.edu.in) admission-process page describing the SEED-based selection (online SEED exam + portfolio + PRPI + PI). SID is merit-list based and does not publish numeric rank cutoffs; this is the authoritative admission/selection page. More specific than the generic /admissions URL.

Symbiosis Institute of Technology Engine.official_note: Official SIT Pune site (sitpune.edu.in). Admission is merit-list based via SITEEE/JEE Main/MHT-CET; SIT does not publish fixed cutoff ranks, merit lists appear on the official site during admissions. The /admissions deep-link currently returns a PHP error, so the homepage is given as the working official entry point.

Symbiosis Law Admission Test.official_note: Official SLAT exam site (slat-test.org). Results delivered via the linked score-card portal; category-wise merit/wait lists and cutoffs are released by each of the four Symbiosis Law Schools on their own portals, not as a single numeric cutoff table.

Symbiosis Liberal Arts Entrance.official_note: Official SET portal page for SSLA (Symbiosis School for Liberal Arts) admission via the Symbiosis Entrance Test. Lists merit-list declaration dates and PI stage; selection is merit-list based (SET + PI), no numeric rank cutoff published. More specific than the generic ssla.edu.in/admissions URL.

Tamil Nadu Engineering Admissions.official_note: Official Government of Tamil Nadu (DoTE) TNEA cutoff portal, dedicated to publishing college/branch/category-wise cutoffs and opening-closing ranks. Sits under the official tneaonline.org domain; preferred over the generic opening-closing-ranks.html static page.

Tamil Nadu Polytechnic Entrance Examinat.official_note: Official DOTE Tamil Nadu polytechnic admission portal (tnpoly.in) where merit-based allotment/rank/counselling data is published (no entrance exam; selection on 10th/SSLC marks). Fetcher returned only the page title (bot-block), and the previously listed tndte.gov.in/site/polytechnic-admission/ now refuses connection; tnpoly.in is the correct live official portal.

Telangana Engineering Agriculture and Ph.official_note: Correct official TG EAPCET (TS EAMCET) last-rank/cutoff page on the TGCHE conducting-body domain (eapcet.tgche.ac.in). Direct deep-link returns 'Invalid Access' (requires in-session navigation / bot-blocks the fetcher), so unverified by fetch though the domain and page are authoritative. Cutoffs are released as last ranks; mirror at tgeapcet.nic.in.
